title: Light Bulbbles
description: Turns the bubbles in your HUD into lightbulbs so you can shine ᕚ('▿')ᕘ ...until they shatter
body:
## A resource pack that turns your HUD bubbles into lightbulbs **¯\\\_(ツ)\_/¯** * Because, you know, lightbulbs. Why not, right?
Preview Look in the gallery silly 🙃
# More coming soon (•̀ᴗ-) #### If you like this, see my other resource packs ## Compatibility *Should* work with any launcher versions 1.20.2+ * If you have issues, let me know Should *NOT* work with any versions pre-1.20.2 * hud sprites worked differently * I will not be making older versions, so... * feel free to port it/remake it/whatever * (a link/reference would be nice if you do) ## Issues [![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49eac7d4916630c1ca7a85fe90f40e2363ae80eb.png)](https://discord.gg/W3T34eVScQ)
